zh.Knossington, Leicester, England, Great B: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可諾希頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wilcockes I於1331年7月2日出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可諾希頓時，他的父親William Wilcockes87歲，母親Joan Fitzwalter87歲。他於1381年與Margery Nowers在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可諾希頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1390年在英國英格蘭波克夏紐托聖 馬也斯 邱奇享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾可諾廷格利。

nameMeanings.name: Wilcockes
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Wilcock, Wilcock, and "s" for sun, son, meaning son of Wilcock

variants.name: Wilcox
meanings: English (Yorkshire, Lancashire, and Flintshire): variant of Wilcock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is based on the pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wilcockes I was born on 2 July 1331, in Knossington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Wilcockes, was 87 and his mother, Joan Fitzwalter, was 87. He married Margery Nowers in 1381, in Knossington, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1390, in St Mary's Church, Newtown, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Knottingley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margery Nowers en 1381, à Knossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1390, à St Mary's Church, Newtown, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Knottingley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wilcockes Iが1331年7月2日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアノシントンで生まれた時，父William Wilcockesは87歳，母Joan Fitzwalterは87歳であった。1381年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアノシントンでMargery Nowersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1390年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアニュートウンスト マリ'ス チャーチで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアノッティングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Marys Church Newtown, Wales, United K: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 뉴타운 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Wilcockes I(이)가 1331년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 노징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wilcockes(은)는 87세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fitzwalter(은)는 87세였다. 그는 1381년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 노징턴에서 Margery Nowers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 뉴타운 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 노틴글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wilcockes I nasceu em 2 de julho de 1331, em Knossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Wilcockes, tinha 87 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitzwalter, tinha 87 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Nowers em 1381, em Knossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.St Marys Church Newtown, Wales, United K: ст мэри'с чурч, нютоун, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wilcockes I родился 2 июля 1331 г. в местности носсингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Wilcockes было 87 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitzwalter, 87. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Nowers в 1381 г. в местности носсингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1390 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, нютоун, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
